---
title: "Assignment 10B: Sentiment Analysis"
author: "Emily El Mouaquite"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Approach

1.  Reproduce the sentiment analysis found in chapter 2 of *Text Mining with R*.

2.  Extend the analysis using [this](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/azminetoushikwasi/happiness-books-quotes-reviews-sentiments) dataset containing quotes from bestselling books about happiness. 

3. Utilize the Syuzhet lexicon for further analysis.
